'''Enton Adelmaa'j''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] designated as [[Twin Suns Eight|Twin Eight]] in [[Twin Suns Squadron]] during the [[Battle of Esfandia]]. During the battle he helped [[Jagged Fel]] with his "surprise" for [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon]] to secure the northern flank. He was then part of the strike team sent to the surface of Esfandia for the double-cross masterminded by [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Tahiri Veila]].

{{Char-stub}}
